app.title: My Next Game
app.tagline: Discover the perfect next game for your Steam profile

home.candidatesFinalPool: Final pick will be one of these top {count}
home.candidatesHybridHint: Final scores (vector + ML). The picked game may differ from #1 in the list.
home.candidatesSampleHint: Cloud demo mode: catalog has only {total} games (sample). For ~122k games, set up R2 — see README.
home.candidatesLimitedPool: Showing {shown} of {target} candidates (limited catalog or library overlap).

recommendation.title: Your next game
recommendation.explainGenreAndHistory: Matches your taste for {genre} and what you enjoyed in {played}. {match}% match.
recommendation.explainGenre: Aligned with {genre}, a genre you play often. {match}% match.
recommendation.explainPlatform: A strong pick for {platform} based on your profile. {match}% match.
recommendation.explainGeneric: {game} ranked best among {pool} indexed candidates ({match}% match).
recommendation.explainLowMatch: Low compatibility ({match}%). None of the {pool} candidates fit well — {game} was the closest match.
recommendation.explainTagAndHistory: Matches your Steam taste for {tag} and what you enjoyed in {played}. {match}% match.
recommendation.explainLastPlayed: Similar to what you've been playing lately ({played}, 10h+). {match}% match.
recommendation.explainTierMatch: Same production tier ({tier}) as {played} — {game} matches that scale. {match}% match.
recommendation.explainMultiAnchor: Similar to your 10h+ recent games ({played}). {game} fits that profile. {match}% match.
recommendation.trainingDrawerCached: Model ready in local cache. Waiting for training metrics.
recommendation.trainingDrawerNoLogs: Training finished without metrics recorded this session.

feedback.thanksUp: Thanks! We'll favor similar games next time.

lgpd.title: Data consent (LGPD)
lgpd.body: To personalize recommendations, we collect public data from your Steam profile (games, playtime, country, and inferred genres). Data is used only for this purpose. You may use the manual form instead if you prefer not to share your Steam profile.
lgpd.manualBody: To personalize recommendations, we use the preferences you provide in this form (genres, favorite games, playtime, and country). Data is used only for this purpose.

errors.missingApiKey: Steam API key is not configured on the server.
errors.profilePrivate: Your Steam profile is private. Use the manual form.
errors.generic: Could not load profile. Please try again.
errors.candidatesUnavailable: Server was busy finding candidates. Please try again shortly.
errors.invalidApiResponse: Invalid response from the recommendations API.
errors.noCandidatesAfterFeedback: No candidates left after your rejections. Try another profile.
errors.noCandidatesEmptyPool: No games passed the quality filters for this profile. Clear rejections or try another profile.

manual.title: Manual profile
manual.subtitle: Tell us your preferences without connecting Steam
manual.playedGames: Games you already played (exclude from recommendations)
